allow: PowerShell($src = "C:\\Users\\Usuario\\Pictures\\Barber Rocha\\.claude"; $backup = "$env:TEMP\\barber-rocha-claude-backup"; if \(Test-Path $backup\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $backup }; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force $src $backup; Get-ChildItem $backup)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\Usuario\\Pictures\\Barber Rocha\\src" -Recurse -File | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.Replace\("c:\\Users\\Usuario\\Pictures\\Barber Rocha\\",""\) }; "---"; Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\Usuario\\Pictures\\Barber Rocha\\.claude" -Recurse -File | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\Usuario\\Pictures\\Barber Rocha\\src" -Recurse -File | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 12 LastWriteTime,Length,@{n='F';e={$_.FullName.Replace\("c:\\Users\\Usuario\\Pictures\\Barber Rocha\\",""\)}})
PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\Usuario\\Pictures\\Barber Rocha"; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "built in|error|Error" | Select-Object -First 10; "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\Usuario\\Pictures\\Barber Rocha"; npx tsc -b --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30; "TSEXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "built in|error TS|Error:" | Select-Object -First 8; "BUILDEXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
